message:
polish(viz): DeliverablesTreeViz round 3/3 — density + responsiveness

- Stat boxes: added 4th "Total" column showing aggregate file count,
  upgraded from grid-cols-3 to grid-cols-4
- Spotlight grid: sm:grid-cols-2 breakpoint so cards pair up on tablets
  instead of stacking to single column until lg
- Mobile overflow verified at 375px viewport

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
